MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SOVEASNA KHUON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Granted. No opposition filed. The Court strikes plaintiff's request for exemplary damages from the Complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Susan Crozier CSR 4761.

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Dismissal Per Ccp 473(B) - Mandatory Relief
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul J. Smoot, Esq. of Law Offices of Paul J. Smoot, Tel. 650.548.0900, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling, which was not contested. PLAINTIFF KATIE PHAN's Motion For Relief From Dismissal Per CCP 473(B) - Mandatory Relief is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)
